channel.title: DLP on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in DLP on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Operations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Operations" , "Incident Response" , "Identity Management" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Automation" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "SIEM" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security operations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn secure baselines, asset management, vulnerability management, monitoring, IAM, automation, and incident response.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Zero Trust" , "Cloud Security" , "Secure SDLC" , "Identity Management" , "PKI" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn resilient system design, secure SDLC, Zero Trust, cloud security, IAM and PKI design, and data security.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Asset Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Asset Security" , "Data Classification" , "Data Protection" , "Data Lifecycle" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Data Governance" , "Privacy" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Asset Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn information classification, data roles, the data lifecycle, asset retention, data security controls, and data protection methods.

item.title: Cloud Security Showdown: AWS vs Azure vs Google Cloud Platform
item.category: "AWS" , "Azure" , "Google Cloud" , "cloud security" , "IAM" , "GuardDuty" , "Security Center" , "Security Command Center" , "DDoS Protection" , "Cloud Armor" , "WAF" , "Private Link" , "DLP" , "cloud computing" , "cloud services" , "cloud providers" , "data protection" , "cybersecurity" , "infrastructure security"
item.description: Compare AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform in terms of cloud security, and learn the differences to make an informed decision for your organization.
